title: GTExpertCore
description: This is a mod for GregTech Expert 2, a ModPack from GregTech CE Unofficial. But it can also be used for other purposes!!
body:
## TODO
- Add cfg to further increase difficulty by integrating non-GT wood creation. -> Supported in v1.3.2
- Added cfg to GT for AE tools and EIO tools and EIO armor. -> Supported in v1.3.3
- Remove dependence on AE2, EIO, DE and DA for implementation. -> Supported in v1.5.2
- All ULV parts (Motor, Piston, etc.) added. -> Supported in v1.5.8
- Add HV and IV Chainsaw. -> Supported in v2.1.4
- Electric Implosion Compressor is converted to no explosive items. -> Supported in v2.2.8
- Separate Electric Implosion Compressor changes to [ImplosionNoBomb](https://modrinth.com/mod/implosionnobomb). -> Supported in v2.3.0
- Separate Sawmill changes to [GTWoodProcessing](https://modrinth.com/mod/gtwp). -> Supported in v2.4.0
- Separate AutoChise changes to [GTMoreTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/gtmoretools) -> Supported in v2.7.0

## Some of the changes include:
- By installing the mods listed below, you can receive various linkages.
- **These major changes can also be controlled by CEu and mod cfg**

### Vanilla
- Added recipe for making flint from gravel blocks

### [GregTech CE: Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-ce-unofficial)
- Nether Star Dust can be created with Chemical Reactor
- Ender Eye can be created with Mixer
- Add HV and IV Chainsaw
- Addition of a new fuel called Naquadah Rocket Fuel
- Added Battery Buffer and Turbo Charger recipes for UHV
- Additional Solar Panel recipes from ULV to UV
- Several new machines will also be added
    - Addition of Void Ore Miner
    - Addition of Advanced Gas Collector
    - Addition of Advanced Chemical Plant
    - Addition of Large Rock Breaker
- Addition of Primitive Parts
    - Motor
    - Pump
    - Conveyor Module
    - Piston
    - Robot Arm
    - Fluid Regulator
    - Field Generator
    - Emitter
    - Sensor
- Vacuum Freezer has more recipes other than Ingot
- Creative machines can be created!!

### [EnderIO](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio-base)
- All materials are converted to GT
- Several new machines will also be added
    - Addition of Vial Extractor
    - Addition of Slice'N'Splice
    - Addition of Soul Binder
    - Addition of Electric Spawner

### AE2([AE2 Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-extended-life))
- All materials are converted to GT
- CEu versions of various molds added
- Additional molds made by GT to be paired with AE2 molds
- Craft of interface with NBT
- Numerous QoL recipes also added

### [AE Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae-additions-extra-cells-2-fork)
- Numerous QoL recipes also added

### NAE2([Neeve's AE2: Extended Life Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nae2))
- Numerous QoL recipes also added

### [Extra CPUs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extracpus)
- Numerous QoL recipes also added

### [Draconic Evolution](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/draconic-evolution) / [Draconic Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/draconicadditions)
- All materials are converted to GT
- Fusion Crafting can now be done with GT recipes
- Addition of Awakened Draconium Coil Block

### [Avaritia 1.1x Kedition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/avaritia-1-1x-kedition)
- All materials are converted to GT

### [Thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)
- All materials are converted to GT
